name: Cloud IAM Policy Modification
description: Detects suspicious IAM policy changes that may grant excessive permissions
query:
// Detect IAM policy modifications in cloud
// Trigger on policy attachment or inline policy creation
events from cloud_audit
where event_name matches "(?i)(PutUserPolicy|AttachUserPolicy|CreatePolicyVersion|PutRolePolicy|AttachRolePolicy|SetIamPolicy|CreateServiceAccountKey)"
group by user_identity
having count(*) > 3
within 300 seconds
